title: Chapter 71
content:
Chapter 71: Familiar Figure

"Munch, munch."

Denzel took a bite of an apple, chewing it as he tossed it aside, walking casually through the city.

’Ah, still so many answers left for me to uncover.’

He sighed internally.

’Yeah at least I would love to take off more of my restrictions, but to do that, I need to proceed with caution.’

He clicked his tongue.

’I’m tired of all the motherfucking interruptions already. Let’s get this shit out of the world. Level up, get stronger, and see exactly how far this system can take me along with these elements.’

His eyes narrowed slightly as he walked.

’The floor... no, this world can’t even bring out the best parts of these elements yet. Maybe it’s something that only becomes overpowered when I max it out.’

He shrugged slightly.

’Well, I guess you never know.’

He let out a slow breath.

’Oh well let me just get back to Aisha. I’m certain she must be missing, or rather, craving my touch...mmh~ I loved that discipling session with her, especially when she was begging to gobble on my dick. How about we get a part two of it or maybe go a little further?’

A faint grin appeared on Denzel’s face.

Then, as he was about to continue walking, his eyes caught sight of a faint purple reflection at the side of his vision.

As his pupils followed it, he saw a massive ass bent over an orange stand. It was unlike anything he had seen, perhaps just a tad bit bigger than his mother’s, but in truth that wasn’t all that attracted him.

It was a woman, picking oranges.

At that moment, Denzel couldn’t help but admire the shape of her figure in front of him.

However, there was something different here. He had seen hundreds of women around the city since he was reincarnated into this world, but this one stood out in a different way, almost in a familiar manner. This time, he didn’t just stare at the slightly rippling shape in lust, but in slight familiarity.

As he squinted slightly, staring, his thoughts continued.

"Hmm...is it me, or have I actually seen that ass before? But, it’s not mum’s, so how is it that big even...meh, it’s probably nothing...I should probably get nothing. It would be really weird if I can’t even remember who the person is, and all I have to say is that her ass looks familiar."

He chuckled as he walked, his hands dipping into his pockets.

’But honestly it does feel oddly familiar. Not just familiar, more like I’ve actually met her enough times to recognize her from behind.’

Then he paused.

’No. I don’t recognize her from her figure. I don’t recognize her dress either.’

The realization hit him suddenly.

’It’s not like that...that girl, she was close to the previous owner of this body.’

He narrowed his eyes.

’Wait, who the hell is she?’

As he focused his gaze more clearly, he realized she was already walking away.

The woman had completely disappeared from where she was, moving off to the side as she left his view.

But right as his was about to move-

"Wait..." He muttered, cautioning himself.

’This presence, I’ve felt it before. I’m so certain of it.’

His finger twitched slightly.

’It felt faint back then but I felt it.That day I first got my job when I met Sophia, or rather, Karen this presence was there.’

’It was faint. Almost completely hidden among the crowd that filled the place.’

’Could that mean this is...The second harem member?’

Without wasting another moment, he moved forward.

He pushed through the crowd, stepping quickly as he tried to close the distance.

He kept getting closer by the minute.

Then, just as he was about to reach her, a man passed between them.

In that instant, the woman seemed to vanish into the crowd.

Denzel’s gaze snapped side to side.

"She’s gone..."

’...but I can still feel it.’

The faint presence still lingered around him, although it seemed he couldn’t pin-point her exact location.

’No. She’s not gone. I can still feel her presence...She’s definitely still here.’

He frowned, worry creeping into his thoughts.

’This is the result of my sense stat being upgraded. I can detect abnormal presence now. Not something a normal human should be able to do.’

’Even if I can’t see her anymore, I can still feel her faint trace. Which means she didn’t just walk away. She didn’t teleport... she hid herself, like a fucking chameleon.’

’Why? What other reason would there be?’

He narrowed his eyes.

’Why would she do that right when I was about to meet her? Could she be avoiding me?’

’Hmm...This new life just got deeper.Is she really just a harem member... or something else entirely? What exactly is her story?’

He glanced around, a bit confused about what to do next, tightening his teeth in slight annoyance.

’It’s already getting pretty late. I already promised myself I was going to fuck the hell out of Aisha...and now this lady shows up to mess everything up...but, this just leaves me wondering if I should be careful for my safety...’ Denzel thought, unsure of what to do next as he lowered his gaze to the floor, mumbling softly to himself in an attempt to make his decision.

’Ugh! Fuck it...I’m tired of all this damn procrastination.’

’But this seems oddly important.’

He clicked his tongue.

’Ah... I can’t even see her. So how the hell am I supposed to follow her? My senses aren’t that sharp yet. Maybe if my sense stat was higher, her cheap camouflage wouldn’t be able to fool me.’

He grunted in frustration.

’Alright, I suppose the best thing to do would be...’

He clenched his fists, gritting his teeth.

’To go to Aisha and follow up on this lead later.’

’As much as I wish to know, whatever secrets this world is hiding I can’t uncover every single one at once.’

He exhaled slowly.

’So first things first’

"Aisha."
